source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The point $A(3,3)$ is reflected across the $x$-axis to $A^{'}$. Then $A^{'}$ is translated two units to the left to $A^{''}$. The coordinates of $A^{''}$ are $(x,y)$. What is the value of $x+y$? <image1>
